MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-15-2015 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT RETAILCAPITAL, LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. IN ADDITION, THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS DEFENDANT RETAILCAPITAL, LLC'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. There is no proof of service on file. In addition, the moving party failed to provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
